stemHtml:
For a planned flight the calculated fuel is as listed below. How much fuel should be aboard to cover the rest of the flight, if the remaining flight time to destination is 1 hour 25 minutes?

Trip Fuel: sufficient for a planned flight time of 4 hours 45 minutes
Operator’s specified Reserve Fuel: 30% of the planned Trip Fuel
Start up and Taxi Fuel: 35 kg
Block Fuel: 735 kg
